description_en: A stone monument expressing repayment of gratitude (shuon), a monument (historic site). It is a town-designated cultural property of Takahata Town, designated on 1980-03-03, located at Niijuku, Takahata Town (within the elementary school grounds).

name_en: Thatched folk house with single wing entrance
